title: Remove dedicated staff mentions and add weekday discount for private events

requirements.text: Remove all mentions of 'dedicated staff', 'staff assistance', or any similar language implying that staff will be assigned to or help manage a private party, from the PrivateEvents component and any other frontend components that reference it. The copy should reflect that guests manage their own party.

quotes: remove any mention of dedicated staff. They take care of their party themselves.

acceptanceCriteria: No text mentioning 'dedicated staff', 'staff', 'assisted', or equivalent language appears in the Private Events section.
The section still clearly describes the private rental offering without implying hosted or staffed service.

requirements.text: Add a $100 weekday discount to the Private Events section. Display a discounted price for bookings made on Monday through Thursday. For example, if the standard price is $650 for 2 hours, show $550 for weekday bookings; if $800 for 3 hours, show $700 for weekday bookings. Clearly label the discount (e.g., 'Weekday discount: Save $100 when you book Monday–Thursday').

quotes: add $100 discount if the private party is booked for weekdays ( monday - thursday).

acceptanceCriteria: The Private Events section displays weekday pricing that is $100 less than the standard price for both rental tiers.
The weekday discount is clearly labeled, specifying Monday through Thursday.
Standard (weekend) pricing is still visible for comparison or clearly indicated.
No backend changes are required — pricing is displayed statically in the frontend.

constraints: Do not change the backend schema or any backend pricing data.
Pricing is displayed as static content in the frontend; no backend calls needed for this change.
nonGoals: Adding an online booking or calendar system.
Dynamically calculating weekday vs. weekend pricing based on a selected date.
Changing any other pricing sections (daily admission, birthday packages, group discounts).
